name: evidence-capture
description: Capture evidence artifacts and emit execution trace when agent session ends

rules.description: Remind to save evidence if module changes were made without test evidence
rules.message: Module changes detected without evidence capture. Save test output to docs/evidence/<YYYYMMDD-HHMM>/<module>/test.log

rules.description: Report uncommitted changes at session end
rules.message: Session ending with uncommitted changes. Review with git status before closing.

rules.description: Emit OpenTelemetry-compatible execution trace at session end

span_types.name: agent_run
span_types.description: Top-level span for the entire agent session

span_types.name: tool_group
span_types.description: Span for a batch of parallel tool invocations
